output.summary:
8 The function f is such that f(x) = a^2x^2 - ax + 3b for x <= 1/(2a), where a and b are constants.
(i) For the case where f(-2) = 4a^2 - b + 8 and f(-3) = 7a^2 - b + 14, find the possible values of a and b. [5]
(ii) For the case where a = 1 and b = -1, find an expression for f^-1(x) and give the domain of f^-1. [5]
